---
title: "Group_05_Analysis"
author: "Group 5"
date: "06/03/2025"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    toc-location: body
    number-sections: false
execute:
  echo: false
---

# Introduction


# Explanatory Data Analysis


# Formal Data Analysis


# Conclusion


# References


# R Studio Language
